title: CUTracer Memory Value Trace Record
description: Schema for MSG_TYPE_MEM_VALUE_ACCESS (type='mem_value_trace') - records the per-thread memory addresses AND the values read/written, captured IPOINT_AFTER (ipoint='A').

ctx.description: CUDA context pointer in hex format

sass.description: SASS instruction string (injected by the Python TraceReader on read; not present in raw NDJSON)

trace_index.description: Sequential index of this trace record

cta.description: CTA (Cooperative Thread Array) coordinates [x, y, z]

pc.description: Instruction byte offset within the kernel function (hex). This is not an absolute virtual address; combine with func_addr from kernel_metadata to get the runtime address.

ipoint.description: Instrumentation point: 'A' (IPOINT_AFTER) for value traces, so the read/written values are observable.

mem_space.description: Memory space enum index (e.g., global / shared / local) as reported by NVBit.

is_load.description: True for a load (read), false for a store (write).

access_size.description: Access size in bytes; determines how many 32-bit value words per thread are emitted (ceil(access_size/4), capped at 4).

addrs.description: Memory addresses accessed by each of the 32 threads in the warp.

values.description: Per-thread value words [thread_index][word_index]; inner length = ceil(access_size/4) capped at 4.
